title: Super Mario Bros. Blocks
description: Adds various blocks from the original Super Mario Bros.
body:
Adds various blocks from the original Super Mario Bros, with a couple of items in as well.

Added blocks:
- Ground (Overworld, Underground, Castle, Underwater)
- Bricks (Overworld, Underground, Castle)
- ? Block (Functional)
- Blank block
- Hard block (Overworld, Underground)
- Coral
- Castle Bridge
- Pipes (Nonfunctional, sadly)

Added items:
- Coin
- Super Mushroom (Consumable)
- Fire Flower (Weapon)
- Super Star (Consumable)
- 1UP Mushroom (Consumable) (2.0 Update)
- A music disc (2.0 Update)

Most blocks are decorational, but have decent stats which could be used for extra protection.

All blocks and items are obtainable through survival.
